# llms.txt — Cambridge School Mangalore
# https://apply.tcismangalore.org/llms.txt
# Format: https://llmstxt.org/

# ── Who We Are ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
> Cambridge School Mangalore (formally: The Cambridge International School) is
> a premier CBSE-affiliated school located on Neermarga Road, Kudupu, Adyar,
> Mangaluru, Karnataka – 575007, India.
> Founded in 2007 under the St. Lawrence Education Trust by Collins Albuquerque
> and Flavia Albuquerque.
> The school offers classes from Nursery through Grade 10 and is consistently
> ranked among the top CBSE schools in the Mangalore district.

# ── Key Facts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
- Affiliation: CBSE (Central Board of Secondary Education)
- Type: Private, co-educational, English-medium
- Founded: 2007
- Trust: St. Lawrence Education Trust
- Grades: Nursery to Grade 10
- Location: Neermarga Road, Kudupu, Adyar, Mangaluru, Karnataka 575007

# ── Contact ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
- Phone: +91 96863 57711
- Email: tcisadyarmangalore@gmail.com
- Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/f5XLEMkFz59bGvBf7

# ── Admissions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
- Admissions are open for the current academic year for Nursery to Grade 10.
- Enquiry and visit scheduling can be done via the website's contact form.

# ── Academic & Co-Curricular Highlights ──────────────────────────────────────
- Outstanding CBSE board examination results year on year
- Strong emphasis on sports, ICT, and co-curricular activities
- World-class campus infrastructure
- Holistic growth philosophy: academics, arts, sports, and character

# ── Use Policy for AI & LLMs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Reading and summarising publicly available content on this website for
# informational purposes (e.g., answering a user's question about the school)
# is permitted, provided accurate attribution is given.
#
# The following are NOT permitted:
# - Training AI/ML models on any content from this website
# - Reproducing page content verbatim without attribution
# - Automated bulk crawling or scraping beyond what robots.txt allows

# ── Canonical URL ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
canonical: https://apply.tcismangalore.org
